mapper.select: SELECT * FROM review_records ORDER BY submitted_at DESC
SELECT * FROM review_records WHERE submitter_username = #{submitterUsername} ORDER BY submitted_at DESC
SELECT * FROM review_records WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY submitted_at DESC
SELECT * FROM review_records WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_records (document_id, document_title, document_type, category, software, document_version, submitter_username, submitter_display_name, status, submitted_at, reviewer_username, reviewed_at, review_comment, previous_content, current_content) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{documentTitle}, #{documentType}, #{category}, #{software}, #{documentVersion}, #{submitterUsername}, #{submitterDisplayName}, #{status}, #{submittedAt}, #{reviewerUsername}, #{reviewedAt}, #{reviewComment}, #{previousContent}, #{currentContent})
mapper.update: UPDATE review_records SET status=#{status}, reviewer_username=#{reviewerUsername}, reviewed_at=#{reviewedAt}, review_comment=#{reviewComment} WHERE id=#{id}
